response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience, with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and event-driven architectures. However, his background lacks explicit executive leadership in fintech or regulated environments, and his AI experience appears more experimental than production-scale. His technical versatility and open-source contributions are strengths, but the role requires deeper fintech and multi-agent AI expertise at scale.
strengths: Diverse technical background with hands-on experience in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and AI-agent tooling (e.g., MCP code generators).
Proven track record in scaling engineering practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, observability) and contributing to open-source platforms like GISCollective.
Strong problem-solving skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and cross-domain projects (web, mobile, embedded, and GIS).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience; current roles are primarily individual contributor or senior developer positions.
Limited evidence of production-scale multi-agent AI systems or fintech infrastructure (e.g., credit risk, real-time trade decisioning).
AI experience appears more experimental (e.g., GISCollective, MCP) rather than operational in high-stakes environments.
